minor_suggestions: Underfull hbox/vbox warnings are nonblocking but worth polishing.
Keep the current limitation wording; it is doing important anti-overclaim work.
No new GPU experiments are required by the inspected claim/table state.
overclaim_risks: The phrase ranks first against eight official-code-level baselines is supported only under the four-domain 10k-user/101-candidate same-candidate protocol.
Actionable uncertainty is acceptable only with the current caveat that several components are weak/redundant.
Calibrated is defensible because method text clarifies the paper-facing calibrated field and no new test-fitted calibrator.
citation_or_metadata_risks: ProMax remains the main metadata blocker: arXiv confirms 11 pages and SIGIR 2026 acceptance, but no final ACM page range / DOI registry visibility yet.
External author/publication pages do not close ACM/Crossref metadata.
ProEx is classified ready in the 20260613 external audit via pages/DBLP-style source evidence, but DOI/Crossref live checks still returned 404, so keep it as a warning.
